title: Luxury Elegant Decorative Rectangular Serving Tray with Handles – Gloss Finish, Gold Trim – For Coffee Table, Vanity, Kitchen or Ottoman – Multiple Designs 40x30x4cm (Pink)
features: Add a touch of Mediterranean flair to your space with this Mosaic Pattern Decorative Serving Tray, featuring a vibrant mix of intricate geometric and floral motifs in rich tones of navy, beige, cream, and brown. The eye-catching octagonal tile-inspired pattern is framed with a sleek gold trim, making it a striking piece for both everyday use and special occasions.
With built-in side handles for easy portability and raised edges for safety, this rectangular tray is perfect for serving, organizing, or decorating.
No More Cluttered Surfaces: Perfect for organizing candles, remotes, and décor items neatly in one place.
Entertain Without the Mess: Raised edges prevent glasses or plates from slipping off while serving.
Effortless Mobility: Built-in handles make it easy to carry food or drinks from kitchen to living room—or even outdoors.
Style Meets Function: Turns a functional item into a visual focal point—ideal for home staging or personalizing your space.
Comfortable cut-out side handles for easy transport
Spacious enough for multiple items—ideal for parties, breakfast in bed, or coffee setups
